map_scope_note: The Hampden County outline is used as the local reference area. Future observed activity may include public-safe regional points outside Hampden County where appropriate.
source_note: Observed activity may eventually come from public-safe sources such as site-maintained observer logs, MQTT-backed tools, public analyzers, public feeds, MeshMapper results for MeshCore coverage checks, field testing notes, or community reports.
ownership_note: Observed activity does not imply ownership, operation, endorsement, or control of every visible node, observer, gateway, repeater, marker, packet, or device by Hampden County Mesh.
privacy_note: Exact private node locations, private observer locations, private gateway locations, private repeater locations, credentials, private messages, and sensitive system details should be omitted or generalized before publication.
location_precision_note: Public activity data should use general areas unless exact sharing is clearly intentional and safe.
